INVALID_REGIME: stop for regime correction if not local
INVALID_STATE: repair fixture or state shape only if local
STEP_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: lower or raise limit only by declared policy
halt for bounded-run design if limit is structural
STOP_DONE: stop if no next objective is declared
STOP_FRONTIER: return to exploration, compression, or certification of frontier burden
do not encode as settled move
STOP_GATE_FAIL: repair smallest local cause if allowed
fork or halt if gate failure is semantic
STOP_LAYER_COLLAPSE: retry only after layer boundary is explicit
STOP_NEEDS_EXTRACTION: stop if extraction would require undeclared authority
STOP_NEEDS_NEW_MOVE: include applies_when, action, emitted readout, and halt behavior
submit for review before registry acceptance
STOP_NEXT_MOVE_BOUNDARY: run proceed again only after the next unit is declared
STOP_NO_APPLICABLE_MOVE: check whether this is a unit boundary
check whether the object is under-typed
record missing-move pressure only if forced
propose smallest missing move only in a later reviewed unit
STOP_RECEIPT_MISMATCH: halt for verifier design if mismatch is not local
STOP_TAXONOMY_GAP: propose smallest honest delta only if needed
STOP_UNDERTYPED_OBJECT: label, withhold, split, or factor object
record taxonomy pressure if current vocabulary cannot classify it
do not promote new label without review
STOP_UNTYPED_UNIT: halt until unit schema is satisfied
STOP_VISIBLE_GOTCHA: repair only if local and non-semantic
halt if repair would touch source trace/receipt/ledger/runner/regime
